MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Oren P. Noah, Esq., of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / moving party Henry Goring
Richard D. Dumont, Esq., of SELMAN BREITMAN (415-979-0400), appearing for defendant / opposing party Scott Co. of California

RULING:
PLAINTIFF HENRY GORING'S MOTION TO COMPEL SCOTT COMPANY OF CALIFORNIA TO PRODUCE ITS CUSTODIAN OF RECORDS AND PERSON MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE FOR DEPOSITION AND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS AT DEPOSITION, AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS
Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Henry Goring's motion to compel Scott Co. of California to produce its custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition and to produce documents at deposition and request for monetary sanctions is denied. Defendant is awarded sanctions in the amount of $1000 (4 hours at $250 per hour). Plaintiff does not dispute the accuracy of paragraphs 5-9 of Mr. Dumont's declaration and thus plaintiff filed this motion prior to completing meet and confer efforts. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Matter not reported = (220/HEK)
